# Add AI assistant collaboration policy

## Why
project-atlas-foundation is designed for AI-assisted collaboration. We need explicit, published rules covering what AI can draft, what requires human approval, and how AI contributions are credited.

## Approach
Create `docs/ai-assistant-policy.md` with:
- Authoritative rules for proposals, docs, PRs, reviews.
- Prohibited actions (no secrets, no auto-merging, no fabricated metrics/dates).
- Review/approval gates for governance docs.
- Enforcement and amendment policy.

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] `docs/ai-assistant-policy.md` added.
- [ ] Linked from `CONTRIBUTING.md` or `README.md`.
- [ ] Reviewed by at least one maintainer.
